article_title: Burnaby Council — 7.3. Attachment 1 - Proposed Location (Bike Learning Zone) 2026.01.27.pdf

briefs.title: Council to Consider: Proposed Bike Learning Zone Site in Burnaby
briefs.summary: Burnaby City Council is set to consider a proposed Bike Learning Zone covering roughly 850 square metres at a location identified on a city map dated January 2026. No decision has been made yet.
briefs.action_required: Check the Burnaby Council meeting agenda for the hearing date and attend if this affects your business area.
